name: assess_technical_needs
description: Evaluate the technical skills gap between what the founder can build and what the concept requires. Produces a gap analysis and, when appropriate, a recommendation for technical co-founding assistance.

concept.description: The refined business concept from evaluate_direction.

skills.description: The founder's skill inventory from collect_skills.

constraints.description: The founder's constraints from collect_constraints. The full output object is passed; budget, time_commitment, and risk_tolerance are the fields this skill uses.

viability.description: The viability assessment from evaluate_project. Used to suppress referrals for non-viable concepts.

required_capabilities.description: Technical capabilities the concept requires for implementation.

founder_coverage.description: Per-capability assessment of the founder's ability to handle each requirement.

gap_severity.description: Overall severity of the technical skills gap.

can_self_build.description: Whether the founder can realistically build the MVP themselves.

referral_appropriate.description: Whether a referral to technical co-founding services is appropriate given the gap analysis and viability assessment.

referral_message.description: Natural-language referral message. Present ONLY when referral_appropriate is true.

self_build_guidance.description: Technical approach guidance. Present ONLY when can_self_build is true.

refined_proposition.description: The refined value proposition after evaluation.

next_actions.description: Recommended next steps to pursue this direction.

open_questions.description: Unresolved questions that need further exploration.

category.description: Broad category the skill falls into.

name.description: Name of the required capability (e.g., 'Backend API development', 'Database design').

importance.description: How important this capability is for the concept's MVP.

description.description: Brief description of what this capability entails for this specific concept.

capability.description: Name of the required capability (matches a TechnicalCapability.name).

founder_can_handle.description: Whether the founder's stated skills cover this capability.

reasoning.description: Brief explanation referencing specific skills from the founder's profile.
